name: miles-reminder-handler

trigger.description: Every hour, Monday to Friday, between 10:00 and 18:00 Argentina time (UTC-3)

description: Cron-based reminder handler for pending approval requests. Runs every hour on business days (Mon-Fri, 10:00-18:00 ART). Queries the Notion lock table (DB 20437e6c) for entries with status=pending and reminder_sent=false. Calculates business hours elapsed since creation using an Argentina timezone-aware algorithm (8 business hours/day, Mon-Fri). When 24+ business hours have elapsed, posts a reminder in the original Slack thread mentioning the area head, then marks reminder_sent=true in the lock to prevent duplicate reminders.
